channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Long-term study links neighborhood conditions to women's cardiovascular risk over time
item.description: A long-term study led by the Harvard Pilgrim Health Care Institute followed 1,200 women in eastern Massachusetts for over two decades, revealing that living in disadvantaged neighborhoods significantl...

item.title: Volvo tests conversation quality as voice control faces challenges
item.description: The article discusses how Volvo is shifting its focus from traditional car specifications to evaluating the quality of conversations in its vehicles. Voice-controlled systems, once seen as a convenien...

item.title: Nashik woman killed by ex-lover in suspected murder-suicide case
item.description: A 20-year-old woman was stabbed to death by her ex-lover in Nashik, Maharashtra, on Friday night. The accused, who had met the victim earlier that evening, allegedly attacked her multiple times near a...

item.title: West Hollywood Water Main Rupture: Progress Made, Sunset Strip Still Closed
item.description: A major water main rupture in West Hollywood caused a massive sinkhole and flooded neighborhoods, damaging over 150 vehicles and requiring extensive repairs. The 100-year-old pipe, which burst on July...

item.title: UDA MP Linked to Violence and Fake Plates in Ol Kalou Probe
item.description: The article details how Kiambaa MP John Njuguna Wanjiku, known as Ka-Wanjiku, denied involvement in the Ol Kalou by-election violence despite his black Toyota Land Cruiser being linked to masked attac...

item.title: Most Canadians back Alberta-B.C. pipeline over Ontario project in new poll
item.description: A national poll conducted by the Angus Reid Institute reveals that most Canadian adults support the construction of both the Trans Mountain and Coastal GasLink pipelines, with stronger backing for the...

item.title: ADC Calls for Tinubu to Resign Over Economic Policies' Impact on Nigerians
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) has accused President Bola Ahmed Tinubu of implementing neoliberal economic policies that have led to widespread poverty and hunger in Nigeria. In a statement, th...

item.title: Transport Groups Dismiss P1 Fare Hike Amid Fuel Price Concerns
item.description: Public transport groups have dismissed the proposed P1 fare increase for public utility vehicles (PUVs), arguing that it would not adequately address the rising fuel costs expected due to geopolitical...

item.title: Younger Generations Drive Physical Music Sales Amid CD Player Decline
item.description: A midyear sales report by entertainment data company Luminate reveals that approximately half of Gen Z and millennials who purchased a CD do not own a CD player. This trend is driven by 'collection bu...

item.title: Springboks celebrate historic brother duo debut in Nations Championship victory
item.description: Stand-in Springbok captain Pieter-Steph du Toit reflected on the emotional significance of seeing Cobus and Jasper Wiese, twin brothers, start together for South Africa in their 43-0 Nations Champions...

item.title: Athlete Collapses During Match, Medical Team Provides Immediate Response
item.description: A professional athlete suffered a sudden collapse during a high-stakes match, prompting an immediate medical response from the team's on-site staff. The incident, which occurred in the final minutes o...

item.title: Xavi Considers International Coaching Role, Targets AFCON
item.description: Barcelona legend Xavi Hernandez has revealed he's open to coaching roles at the Africa Cup of Nations (AFCON) and is eyeing international opportunities. After leaving Barcelona in May 2024 following a...

item.title: Sai Tamhankar's 'Bol Bol Rani' Review: A Thriller's Struggles with Narrative Complexity
item.description: The article reviews the Marathi movie 'Bol Bol Rani' directed by Sid Vinsurkar, starring Sai Tamhankar as Maya, a rural woman central to a mystery involving her husband's death. The film explores thre...

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Reaffirms DCP's Intent to Field Presidential Candidate in 2027
item.description: Rigathi Gachagua, leader of the Democracy for the Citizens Party (DCP), has reaffirmed that his party will field a presidential candidate in the 2027 General Election. This comes amid ongoing uncertai...

item.title: NCCIA Issues Summons to Imran's Sister Over Alleged Defamation of State Institutions
item.description: The National Cyber Crime Investigation Agency (NCCIA) has summoned Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI) founder Imran Khan's sister, Noreen Niazi, for spreading false and inflammatory content on social medi...

item.title: Josh Kerr breaks mile world record at London Stadium
item.description: Josh Kerr, a Scottish athlete, has shattered the men's mile world record with a time of 3:42.66 at the London Stadium, surpassing Hicham El Guerrouj's 27-year-old mark. His achievement places him amon...

item.title: Young Professionals Drive Ukraine's Defense Innovation
item.description: The article highlights a generational shift in Ukraine's defense sector, where young professionals are leading innovation and reform. Recent graduates are streamlining procurement processes, designing...

item.title: NBI Investigates Procurement Anomalies in 2019 SEA Games Sports Complex
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) is probing the 2019 Southeast Asian Games (SEA Games) sports complex in New Clark City, Tarlac, over alleged procurement irregularities and financial mismana...

item.title: Woman Seriously Injured in Car Flip on DVP Ramp
item.description: A woman was treated for serious injuries following a car accident that resulted in a flip on the DVP (Don Valley Parkway) ramp. Toronto police are investigating the incident, which occurred on July 18...

item.title: Springboks dominate Wales with 43-0 victory in Nations Championship
item.description: The Springboks showcased their dominance in the 2026 Nations Championship by defeating Wales 43-0 at Kings Park Stadium. The match, part of their home leg campaign, saw the team amass 130 points and 2...
